articles.title: Telangana sees heatwave; rain, gusty winds forecast - Hyderabad Mail
articles.search_term: (heatwave OR "heat wave" OR "severe heatwave" OR "extreme heat" OR "heat spell" OR "scorching heat" OR "blistering heat" OR "sweltering heat" OR "hot winds" OR loo OR "hot loo winds" OR "intense heat" OR "unbearable heat" OR "deadly heat" OR heat OR "weather forecast" OR "weather update" OR "weather alert" OR "IMD forecast" OR "IMD prediction" OR "IMD alert" OR IMD OR "rising temperatures" OR "temperatures expected to rise" OR "relief from heat" OR "respite from heat" OR "heat respite" OR "respite from scorching heat") Telangana
articles.full_text:
HYDERABAD: Heatwave conditions continue across Telangana, with high temperatures affecting daily life in several areas, including Hyderabad.
Light rains with strong winds expected
The Hyderabad Meteorological Centre said scattered rainfall is likely across Telangana over the next three days.
Officials said that while daytime temperatures may appear slightly lower, heatwave conditions will persist due to strong hot winds. Some areas may receive rain accompanied by gusty winds.
Heat keeps roads empty in Hyderabad
In Hyderabad, roads are turning deserted during peak daytime hours due to the intense heat.
Officials said temperatures may rise further in the coming days and advised people to take precautions. They urged residents to avoid stepping out during the day to prevent heat-related health issues.
